sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link, useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Clock, BookOpen, Users, Star, Play } from 'lucide-react'; const ScenarioDetail: React.FC = () => { // In a real implementation, this would fetch from backend // For now, we'll use mock data for the first scenario const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>(); // Mock data for the first scenario const scenario = { _id: '1', title: 'The Inventory That Changed Everything', description: 'A complex civil litigation case involving inventory discrepancies, contract disputes, and corporate fraud allegations. This scenario challenges participants to navigate through evidence analysis, witness examination, and legal argumentation.', practiceArea: 'Civil Law', difficulty: 'Intermediate', estimatedTime: 45, rating: 4.5, reviewCount: 24, price: 0, // Free scenario tags: ['contract law', 'evidence analysis', 'civil litigation'], status: 'published', createdAt: '2025-01-15T10:30:00Z', updatedAt: '2025-01-20T14:45:00Z', creator: { username: 'LegalExpert2025' }, learningObjectives: [ 'Analyze complex contractual disputes', 'Evaluate inventory management evidence', 'Develop cross-examination strategies', 'Apply civil procedure rules', 'Construct persuasive legal arguments' ], courtType: 'District Court', parties: [ { role: 'Plaintiff', name: 'Meridian Technologies Ltd.' }, { role: 'Defendant', name: 'Global Supply Corp.' }, { role: 'Witness', name: 'Sarah Johnson, Inventory Manager' }, { role: 'Expert', name: 'Dr. Michael Chen, Forensic Accountant' } ] }; const getDifficultyColor = (difficulty: string) => { switch (difficulty) { case 'Beginner': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'; case 'Intermediate': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800'; case 'Advanced': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'; case 'Expert': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'; default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'; } }; return (
Back to Scenarios

{scenario.title}

{scenario.difficulty}
{scenario.practiceArea}
{scenario.estimatedTime} min
{scenario.rating} ({scenario.reviewCount} reviews)
{scenario.courtType}

{scenario.description}

{scenario.tags.map((tag, index) => ( {tag} ))}

Learning Objectives

    {scenario.learningObjectives.map((objective, index) => (
  • {objective}
    • ))}

Parties Involved

{scenario.parties.map((party, index) => (
{party.name}
{party.role}
))}

Scenario Coming Soon

This scenario is currently under development. Check back soon to experience this legal challenge!

); }; export default ScenarioDetail;
